'''âz-l-t-k''' ('''kazaltekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neuronavigate|neuronavigate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neuronavigate|neuronavigate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazaltekoko
|}
